data.description:
The initial library of building blocks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Steps: fetch ticket/commits/epic-graph, render context, gate (plain Python), comment verdict, plain tag, set fields.
- [ ] The gate evaluates findings vs a versioned policy (UNSECURED here; cryptographic security is epic 8a1c).
Files: src/rebar/llm/workflow/steps.py
data.title: WS-E2: Deterministic built-in steps (incl. unsecured gate)
